items.label: Getting Started
items.content:
## Welcome!

ZYNQ bundles realtime WebRTC + games library in one system.
Fast setup, peer-to-peer communication, zero config.

items.label: Script Tag
items.content:
### Script Tag

Load ZYNQ globally via CDN.

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.0.9/index.min.js"></script>
```

items.label: ES Module
items.content:
### ES Module

Side-effect import only (sets `window.ZYNQ`).

```javascript
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.0.9/index.min.js"
```

items.label: Game Object
items.content:
### Game Object
Represents a single game entry.

Example:
```js
{
  name: "Alien Hominid",
  alias: "alien-hominid",
  url: "arcade/alien-hominid"
}
```

children.label: list
children.content:
### list
Current filtered games array.

```js
ZYNQ.games.list
// [{name, alias, url}]
```

children.label: total
children.content:
### total
Total games in library.

```js
ZYNQ.games.total
// 1280
```

children.label: filteredCount
children.content:
### filteredCount
Number of visible games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filteredCount
// 42
```

children.label: history
children.content:
### getHistory()
Recently played games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getHistory()
// [{alias, name, url}]
```

children.label: favorites
children.content:
### favorites
Set of saved favorites.

```js
ZYNQ.games.favorites
// Set(['alien-hominid'])
```

children.label: .init()
children.content:
### init()
Loads game database.

Example:
```js
await ZYNQ.games.init()
```
Callback: none

children.label: .search()
children.content:
### search(query)
Filters games by name.

```js
ZYNQ.games.search('alien')
```
Returns updated games list.

children.label: .getRandomOne()
children.content:
### getRandomOne()
Returns single random game.

```js
const g = ZYNQ.games.getRandomOne()
```

children.label: .sortByPopularity()
children.content:
### sortByPopularity()
Sort by play count.

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

children.label: .addToHistory()
children.content:
### addToHistory(alias)
Adds game to history.

```js
ZYNQ.games.addToHistory('alien-hominid')
```

items.label: Constructor
items.content:
### ZYNQ.Peer
WebRTC wrapper with auto reconnect + queue system.

```js
const peer = new ZYNQ.Peer({ txt: true })
```
Event: ready → (id)

children.label: .send()
.getStream()
children.content:
Get camera/mic stream.

```js
const stream = await peer.getStream({ video: true })
```

children.label: ready
children.content:
Fires when peer ID is assigned.

```js
peer.on('ready', (id) => {})
// id: string
```

children.label: message
